headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Announces Regular Second Quarter Dividend
summary: ROLLING MEADOWS, Ill., April 29, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of seventy cents per share on the Common Stock of the Company,...

headline: What To Expect From Arthur J. Gallagher’s (AJG) Q1 Earnings
summary: Insurance brokerage firm Arthur J. Gallagher (NYSE:AJG) will be reporting earnings this Thursday after market close. Here’s what you need to know.
